title: Bitcoin-Backed Ecash Systems
description: Bitcoin-backed ecash mints use blind signatures to trade trust assumptions for fast, private transfers with low on-chain overhead. Understanding mint trust models is critical before treating balances as final.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Ecash
resources.notes: Survey of ecash protocols and their integration points with Bitcoin.

resources.title: BTC Transcripts Tag: Ecash
resources.notes: Workshop-level discussion of trust models and federation design.
